summary: Wonderful audience recording that captures one of the era's best pre‑drums second sets.
review: The audience tape is praised for its clear, well‑balanced sound, making it a standout listening experience. Reviewers highlight the second set as one of the finest pre‑drums performances of the 1980s. Overall the show is regarded positively despite limited detail on individual songs.

ai_rating.rationale: Both musical performance (noted as a top pre‑drums second set) and recording quality (described as wonderful sounding) are strong, yielding a rating just above the 4‑star level.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear, well‑balanced audience capture with minimal noise; reviewers prefer this AUD over SBDs from the era.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set singled out as a highlight of the pre‑drums era, indicating strong pacing and energy throughout that portion.
